info.name: Assessment Service - Local
info.description: API collection for the Tests module of the Assessment Service.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "plain",
  "title": "Week 1 - Mini Quiz",
  "description": "Once you attempt the quiz and click 'Submit', you will see a confirmation message. This means your response was securely recorded. Please do not worry if the quiz appears as incomplete upon reloading the page.",
  "showTime": true,
  "timeDuration": 60,
  "showTimeFinished": false,
  "timeFinishedDuration": 5,
  "totalMarks": 100,
  "passingMarks": 0,
  "attempts":2,

//   "startDate": "2025-07-27T00:00:00.000Z",
//   "endDate": "2025-07-28T00:00:00.000Z",
  "answerSheet": true,
  "showCorrectAnswer": true,
  "printAnswersheet": false,
  "questionsShuffle": true,
  "answersShuffle": true,
  "gradingType": "quiz",
  "isObjective": true,
  "showThankyouPage": true,
  "showAllQuestions": false,
  "paginationLimit": 10,
  "showQuestionsOverview": true,
  "status":"unpublished"
}

body.raw:
{
  "text": "What is the capital of France?",
  "alias": "capital-france",
  "description": "Choose the correct capital of France from the options.",
  "type": "mcq",
  "level": "easy",
  "marks": 5,
  "status": "published",
  "idealTime": 30,
  "gradingType": "quiz",
  "allowPartialScoring": false,
 "testId":"394e8654-19c0-4f04-9996-983f7d4d84b6",
 "sectionId":"b0c56811-e6e6-4c74-8e56-a486ad16e9d1",
  "options": [
    {
      "text": "Paris",
      "isCorrect": true,
      "marks": 5,
      "position": 1
    },
    {
      "text": "Berlin",
      "isCorrect": false,
      "marks": 0,
      "position": 2
    },
    {
      "text": "Madrid",
      "isCorrect": false,
      "marks": 0,
      "position": 3
    },
    {
      "text": "Rome",
      "isCorrect": false,
      "marks": 0,
      "position": 4
    }
  ]
}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Easy Math Questions Rule",
  "description": "Selects easy-level math questions with MCQ type from the pool.",
  "ruleType": "category_based",
  "numberOfQuestions": 10,
  "poolSize": 50,
  "minMarks": 1,
  "maxMarks": 5,
  "selectionStrategy": "random",
  "criteria": {
    "categories": ["math", "arithmetic"],
    "difficultyLevels": ["EASY"],
    "questionTypes": ["MCQ"],
    "tags": ["algebra", "addition"],
    "marks": [1, 2]
   
  },
  "status": "published",
  "priority": 1,
  "selectionMode": "DYNAMIC"
}
